zh.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst是Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu和Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen的女兒，出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。她於1151年與Comte Thierry I de Beveren結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1170年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst是Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu和Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen的女儿，出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。她于1151年与Comte Thierry I de Beveren结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1170年。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst was born in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium as the daughter of Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu and Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. She married Comte Thierry I de Beveren in 1151. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1170.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst est née à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, fille de Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu et Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Elle a épousé Comte Thierry I de Beveren en 1151. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1170.

de.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst wurde in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien, als Tochter von Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu und Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen geboren. Sie hat 1151 Comte Thierry I de Beveren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1170.

it.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst è nata il nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio come figlia di Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu e Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Lei sposato Comte Thierry I de Beveren nel 1151. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1170.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalstはベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントでBaron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le BarbuとLiutgarde Berthout van Grimbergenの娘として生まれた。1151年にComte Thierry I de Beverenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1170年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst(은)는 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu(와)과 Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1151년 Comte Thierry I de Beveren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst nasceu em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica filha de Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu e Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Ela casou-se com Comte Thierry I de Beveren em 1151. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1170.

ru.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst родилась в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. Её родителей звали Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu и Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte Thierry I de Beveren в 1151 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1170 г.

es.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Aalst nació en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica como hija de Baron Boudewijn III van Gent dit Le Losche et Le Barbu y Liutgarde Berthout van Grimbergen. Se casó con Comte Thierry I de Beveren en 1151. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1170.
